title: Japan magnitude 9.0 earthquake — industrial heartland direct hit
historical_analogue: 2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami (Fukushima, $235B losses, 6-month auto impact)
description: A magnitude 9.0 earthquake strikes near Tokyo-Nagoya industrial corridor. Toyota City production halts. Renesas (world's largest MCU maker) fab is destroyed. Global automotive and electronics supply chains face 6-month rebuilding timeline.
